summary: Truth reconciliation testing completed successfully. Verified that Olakunle Alonge shows 'Ready to Work' status consistently across all views (Employees List, Employee Profile, Dashboard, Audit View). The fix removed inline calculations that were showing 'Nearly Complete' for 81% progress. Now all views use work_readiness from API as single source of truth.
passed_tests: ✅ Employees List - Olakunle Alonge Work Status shows 'Ready to Work' (not 'Nearly Complete')
✅ Employees List - Olakunle Alonge File Status shows 'Ready to Work' (matches Work Status)
✅ Employees List - Work Status and File Status use same source (API work_readiness)
✅ Employee Profile - Header badge shows 'Ready to Work' (green)
✅ Employee Profile - Audit Quick View DBS card shows 'Current' status
✅ Employee Profile - Work Status card shows 'Ready to Work'
✅ Dashboard - Recent Employees shows Olakunle with 'Ready to Work' badge
✅ Dashboard - Workforce Readiness shows correct counts (2 Ready to Work, 2 Supervised Start, 3 Not Ready)
✅ Audit View - Workforce Status shows 'Ready to Work' label (not 'Nearly Complete')
✅ Audit View - No 'Nearly Complete' labels found
✅ DBS Register - Olakunle shows 'Current' status matching Profile DBS card
✅ Backend API returns consistent work_readiness across endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: EmployeesPage.js correctly uses emp.work_readiness from API (lines 494-499)
EmployeesPage.js Work Status and File Status columns both use workStatusLabel from API (lines 524-538)
EmployeeProfilePage.js correctly uses complianceRequirements?.work_readiness from API (lines 1424-1434)
No inline calculations for work status based on percentage - all views use API work_readiness
Single source of truth pattern correctly implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Truth reconciliation verified. Olakunle Alonge (OCS-0001) shows 'Ready to Work' consistently across all views: Employees List (Work Status & File Status), Employee Profile (header badge, Work Status card), Dashboard (Recent Employees), Audit View (Workforce Status). The 'Recruitment File: Incomplete' shown in Employee Profile is a DIFFERENT metric (document completion 4/6) and is expected behavior - it's separate from work_readiness status.

verification_details.key_distinction: Work Status (work_readiness) is different from Recruitment File (document completion). Both are correct and use their respective data sources.
